metadata.description: Personal Claude Code skill collection — domain-organized monorepo by donggu

plugins.name: donggu-obsidian
plugins.description: Obsidian PKM vault operations — health audits, journal-to-CORE extraction rituals, duplicate detection. For LYT / PARA / Zettelkasten vaults.

plugins.name: donggu-docs
plugins.description: Document & deck authoring — zero-dependency animation-rich single-HTML slide decks for lectures, seminars, workshops, and launch talks. Style driven by a designs/ DESIGN.md library or visual discovery.

plugins.name: donggu-sns
plugins.description: SNS content authoring — writing-social-content (Blog master + LinkedIn/X/Threads/Maily variants, Socratic voice-learning from the Obsidian vault), make-insta-card-news (DESIGN.md-driven Instagram cards, Pexels/Commons sourcing + headless render), make-shorts (news→CapCut 9:16 draft), and publish-sns (webhook publishing with preview-approval gate + ledger), plus get-stock-image / get-ai-image as swappable blog-image sources. Preserves 회고형 1인칭 voice.

plugins.name: donggu-media
plugins.description: YouTube transcript fetch — grabs ONLY a video's 자막/스크립트 text (~tens of KB over HTTP; never downloads the video or audio). get-youtube-scripts = transcript text; save-youtube-source = Obsidian reference note (summary + jump-timestamps). Captions-only.

plugins.name: donggu-apply
plugins.description: Freelance proposal auto-apply — capture login session, crawl a project brief + client pre-questions, draft a proposal from the portfolio Supabase DB (SSOT), autofill the apply form, and gate submission behind a Discord HITL button. apply-wishket skill (Wishket); DRY-RUN preview unless explicitly submitted; structured to add more platforms.
